{{Infobox concept
| name = Watchman (The Elder Empire: Sea)
| introduced = ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|A Watchman is a member of the [[Blackwatch]], an order established by a female founder who adopted the title to maintain equality with her male peers. The organization is identified by its crest, known as the [[Elder]]’s Eyes, which depicts six inhuman eyes over a nest of tentacles. Members are easily recognized by their black uniforms and possess authority that extends even over [[Elders]]. The [[Blackwatch]] is dedicated to protecting humanity by studying [[Elder]] biology and attempting to redirect the powers of [[Elders]] for human benefit. Their work often involves tracking and summoning [[Elderspawn]] within the [[Aion Sea]], a dangerous body of water filled with various monsters. While their mission is to safeguard citizens from incomprehensible threats, the order's activities involve intense research into these entities to better understand and oppose them.}}

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The founder of the Greenwarden order was a woman who took the name 'Watchman'.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c4">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Andel]] picked up a saber from the corpse of a Watchman.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c11">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Calder]] is a Watchman with the [[Blackwatch Guild]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c15">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Watchmen]] are officials who can take a person's word for an emergency if they wear a Watchman's coat and badge.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c19">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 19</ref>}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Watchmen]] are described by [[Jerri]] as reclusive and shady.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c11">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|Every Watchman in the [[Blackwatch]] is sworn to protect people from unbelievable things.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c14">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 14</ref>}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|A Watchman could pick up the [[Sleepless]] cell in the Capital.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c5">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 5</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Of Sea and Shadow]]
[[Category:Of Dawn and Darkness]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire concepts]]
[[Category:Titles]]
